files.notes: This file contains three lesson sections that were merged together. The first is just a header for Lesson II with no content. The second is a complete genealogy lesson on surnames. The third is an art lesson on Indian Summer landscapes that appears to be cut off mid-sentence at the end. The file seems to be missing some content and has OCR artifacts.
